title: Karafka: error.occurred
description: A Karafka consumer or the Karafka framework raised an error.

topic.description: Kafka topic where the error occurred, if applicable.

partition.description: Kafka partition where the error occurred, if applicable.

consumer_group.description: Consumer group where the error occurred, if applicable.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID from the active web request context, if any. Merged globally by the Honeybadger agent.

hostname.description: Server hostname. Attached to every event by default (events.attach_hostname).

environment.description: Application environment, e.g. "production". Attached to every event by default (events.attach_environment).
